summary: End-to-end testing of CareerVerse Admin Panel (backend + frontend). Backend pytest suite (16 cases) all PASS. Playwright E2E covering guest gate, regular-user gate, admin login, stats cards, search, include_deleted toggle, drawer details, row-level ban with login-403 verification, soft-delete with stat decrement, and responsive table column hiding — all PASS.

cases: TestAdminUsersList::test_list_users_admin_200 (shape: users[], total; all required fields present incl. mentorSessionCount)
TestAdminStats::test_stats_admin (numeric: totalUsers, deletedUsers, bannedUsers, adminCount, mentorSessions, mentorMessages)

frontend_test_results.guest_admin_route_access_denied_gate: PASS (admin-access-denied visible, admin-page NOT in DOM, sign-in link present, navbar-admin-link hidden)
frontend_test_results.regular_user_signed_in_admin_gate: PASS (test.student → /admin still shows admin-access-denied; navbar-admin-link still hidden)
frontend_test_results.search_filters_table: PASS (q='test' → 1 row matching test.student@careerverse.io / Test Student)
frontend_test_results.banned_user_login_403_with_error: PASS (login stays on /login with message 'Your account has been suspended')
frontend_test_results.row_soft_delete_with_confirm_removes_and: PASS (totalUsers 7 → 6, row removed, restored when include_deleted toggled)
frontend_test_results.responsive_columns_hidden_on_mobile: PASS ('Registered' th computed display=none at 390px viewport)

critical_code_review_comments: Defense in depth is correct: admin gate is enforced both client-side (auth.user.role !== 'admin') and server-side (require_admin Depends).
JWT_SECRET still falls back to 'dev-secret' if env var missing (carried over from auth router; preview-acceptable but should be required in prod).
_strip() helper correctly drops _id AND password_hash before returning admin user objects — no PII leakage.
ensure_admin_seeded is idempotent and also auto-promotes an existing matching email to admin role, which is a sensible upgrade path.
Soft-delete is properly final: GET /admin/users hides by default, login returns 401, /auth/me returns 401, and bannedAt/deletedAt are ISO strings or null (consistent type contract).
Minor: the React Admin.jsx fetchAll re-fires on every keystroke (no debounce). On a typical dataset this is fine, but consider a 300ms debounce to reduce backend chatter. Not a blocker.
test_credentials: Verified: admin@careerverse.io / Admin@1234 (seeded) and test.student@careerverse.io / Test@1234 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: Created throwaway qa.admin.<ts>@careerverse.io users via /auth/register inside the throwaway_user fixture (each test gets a fresh subject and ends up soft-deleted or banned/unbanned). Also one Playwright soft-delete left one historical 'QA Admin Subject' user with deletedAt set — harmless and reproducible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel is fully verified PASS end-to-end (backend + frontend). Reusable regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_admin.py. Key data-testids: admin-page, admin-access-denied, admin-stat-{total|banned|admins|mentor}, admin-users-table, admin-user-row-<id>, admin-user-view/ban/delete-<id>, admin-user-drawer, admin-user-drawer-close, admin-detail-email, admin-detail-activity, admin-search, admin-include-deleted, admin-empty-row, navbar-admin-link. The AI Mentor live LLM was intentionally NOT exercised this iteration (per main agent note — Emergent LLM Key budget exhausted).
